response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/mobile software engineer but lacks the core qualifications for a Principal Performance Architect role focused on AI accelerator hardware. No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, deep learning workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design. Background is predominantly web platforms, GIS, and direct-mail automation rather than cloud infrastructure for AI accelerators.
strengths: Long tenure with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Sociomantic
Polyglot engineer with C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship and testing discipline
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
No deep learning, GPU, or AI accelerator workload background
Education/experience path does not align with Principal hardware IC role

key_factors.factor: No GPU or SIMD/MIMD architecture background
